title: Totem of Fumo
description: This resource pack add plush fumo to Minecraft!
body:
Optifine Required

To change the texture of the totem of undying rename it on the anvil to one of the words from the list below

Reim﻿u
Marisa
Cirno
Smart Cirno
Sakuya﻿
Satori
Koishi
Youmu
Yuyuko
Yukari
Flandre
Ran
Patchouli

Use an empty frame to put the fumo
/give @s item_frame{EntityTag:{Invisible:1b}} 1
